report.summary: Community growth cycle v23: drafted social content and newsletter additions for 3 new pages (Data Availability Layer Guide, DeFi Options Guide, Hyperliquid HIP-3); created 2 new OG social cards; extended posting schedule through Fri-Sun Mar 20-22 building on v22's Mon-Thu calendar.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Friday Mar 20, 10am ET): Data Availability Wars — 5-post thread covering Celestia (~50% market share, DAS light nodes), EigenDA V2 (100 MB/s DAC model), and Avail (DAS + KZG, ~40s finality); comparison framework CTA to /learn/data-availability-layer-guide-2026; $TIA $ETH $AVAIL tags

Twitter thread (Saturday Mar 21, 11am ET): DeFi Options 2026 — 5-post thread: $342B monthly volume, +872% YoY hook; Derive (~70% share, $369M+ monthly), Stryke (40x AMM fees), Panoptic (perpetual options, any Uni v3 pair); CTA to /learn/defi-options-trading-guide-2026; $ETH $DRV tags
Tweet (Thursday Mar 19, 1pm ET): Hyperliquid HIP-3 — single-tweet hook explaining tokenized funding rates mechanism; CTA to /learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide; $HYPE tag

Discord/Telegram (Friday Mar 20, morning): 3-page drop announcement — DA Layer Guide, DeFi Options Guide, Hyperliquid HIP-3 Guide; all with direct URLs and interactive tool callouts; no-ads positioning

Newsletter additions (Thursday Mar 19 edition): 3 new pages added to NEW ON DEGEN0X section with one-line descriptions; DeFi options $342B/+872% YoY growth added to Degen Corner with Panoptic perpetual options angle

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Signals
items: Tax season content peaking: /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 on steep upward curve — April 15 exactly 30 days out, maximum search intent window
Ethereum Pectra countdown: /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide gaining momentum with ~25 days to upgrade; tweet cadence opportunity daily
DeFi narrative rotation: DeFAI and DA Layer content shows early-adopter search growth; DA Layer guide arriving at right time as Celestia/EigenDA narrative heats up in March 2026
Options market awakening: $342B monthly on-chain options (source: build v8 research) + 872% YoY suggests DeFi options becoming mainstream — guide fills gap on degen0x

sections.title: New Pages in Pipeline
items: /learn/data-availability-layer-guide-2026 — Built Mar 16, in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Celestia/EigenDA/Avail comparison with interactive DALayerComparison.tsx sortable chart
/learn/defi-options-trading-guide-2026 — Built Mar 16, in PUBLISH_QUEUE. Derive/Stryke/Panoptic with OptionsPayoffCalculator wired in
/learn/hyperliquid-hip3-tokenized-futures-guide — PUBLISHED Mar 16 (Day 38). Hip3FundingCalculator, 3x JSON-LD schemas, full QA pass

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: og-data-availability-layer-guide.svg — 1200x630 social card: 3-column protocol comparison (Celestia/EigenDA/Avail) with market share, throughput, finality; dark glass-morphism; interactive comparison badge

og-defi-options-guide-2026.svg — 1200x630 social card: $342B hero stat + +872% YoY badge; 3-protocol mini cards (Derive/Stryke/Panoptic); call option payoff curve visualization with P&L calculator badge
og-hyperliquid-hip3-guide.svg — EXISTING asset (previously created, already comprehensive): HIP-3 markets breakdown, 5 stat cards, flow diagram; no changes needed

sections.title: Posting Schedule (v23 additions — extends v22 calendar)
items: Thu Mar 19, 1pm ET — Twitter: Hyperliquid HIP-3 funding tokenization tweet
Thu Mar 19, send time — Email: Newsletter with 3 new page additions + Degen Corner DeFi options alpha
Fri Mar 20, 10am ET — Twitter: Data Availability Wars 5-post thread
Fri Mar 20, morning — Discord/Telegram: 3-page drop announcement
Sat Mar 21, 11am ET — Twitter: DeFi Options 2026 5-post thread

report.analytics_insight: Tax season + Pectra countdown = two timed content spikes converging in next 30 days. Recommend pinning /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 and /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide to top of Twitter bio and Discord announcement channel for duration of the windows.
